title: Horror Multiplayer
description: Horror Multiplayer with friends including ingame voice chat
body:
A chilling multiplayer horror modpack designed to turn Minecraft into a terrifying survival experience. Play with friends, explore the unknown, and try to stay alive… if you can.
This is a multiplayer-focused horror modpack built to make every moment in Minecraft feel tense, dark, and unpredictable.

🌑 What to Expect:

Terrifying mobs and unexpected encounters
Dark, atmospheric world generation
Survival mechanics that make nights actually scary
Sound and visual effects that keep you on edge

👥 Best Played With Friends
This modpack is designed for co-op gameplay. Exploring alone is scary… but exploring together might be even worse.

⚙️ Features:

Optimized for smooth performance
Easy to install using Modrinth launcher
Balanced gameplay (not impossible, but challenging)

💀 Warning:
This pack contains jump scares, creepy sounds, and intense moments. Not recommended for players who get scared easily.

🎮 Gather your friends, turn off the lights, and see how long you survive…
